name: Cynet Rollback
name_jp: サイバネット・ロールバック
desc: Target 1 of your banished Cyberse monsters; Special Summon it. During your Main Phase, if your LP are 2000 or less: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 2 of your banished Cyberse monsters; add them to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Cynet Rollback" once per turn.
eff: Target 1 of your banished Cyberse monsters; Special Summon it. During your Main Phase, if your LP are 2000 or less: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 2 of your banished Cyberse monsters; add them to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Cynet Rollback" once per turn.

action: Adds banished cards to the hand
summoning: Special Summons the player's banished monsters
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
